$comment: Source of truth for the apodictic:reader_question block (Beta-Reader Instrument Generation, revision-coach). Validated by scripts/apodictic_artifacts.py (stdlib subset checker) via scripts/reader_instrument.py. A question turns a framework-side UNCERTAINTY into a non-leading, content-neutral reader probe. `source_kind` selects which provenance field is required (targets for findings/tradeoffs, source_note for unresolved-questions) — that conditional-required rule is enforced in the Python validator (B3), not the flat subset schema. `targets` and `source_note` are therefore optional here (but declared). Closed-key (additionalProperties:false) enforced by the engine (Harness Contracts v2): every legitimate field — including the two optional provenance fields — is declared, so a misspelled field now fails. Declared closed in schemas/_coverage.json. See docs/beta-reader-instrument.md.
title: APODICTIC reader question (apodictic.reader_question.v1)
